title: Disable Nether/End Command
description: Control Nether and End access with instant command toggles, timed actions, and a daily scheduler
body:
# 🌋🚫 Disable Nether/End Command 🚫🌋 Control Nether and End access with instant toggles, timed actions, and a daily scheduler.
## ✨ Features - Toggle Nether/End on or off with commands - Timed toggles with broadcast on schedule and execution - Optional auto scheduler with multiple daily time windows - Scheduler reminders before upcoming changes - Portal blocking with anti‑spam messaging - Player handling options: allow exit or force teleport out - One‑time bypass via /tpforce for disabled dimensions - Multiverse‑friendly (targets worlds by environment) ## 🧰 Commands ``` /nether [time] /end [time] /tpforce /dnec reload ``` ## ⚙️ Config Overview - messages: All player/admin messages (update message is not configurable) - scheduler: Daily windows, reminders, and scheduler announcements - worlds: Preferred worlds for teleporting (supports Multiverse setups) - player-handling: Allow exit or force teleport out - notifications: Broadcast control - update-checker: Enable/disable update checks - timezone: Scheduler timezone ## ✅ Compatibility - Minecraft: 1.18–1.21 - Servers: Paper, Spigot, Purpur, and other Bukkit forks ## 📦 Installation 1. Download the jar and place it in your server’s plugins/ folder 2. Restart the server to generate config.yml 3. Configure settings, then run /dnec reload
